title: Custom Nether Portal
description: Build Nether Portals of any size, form and in any direction: on the floor, on walls, on the ceiling or floating in the air.
body:
![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/CUSTOM_NETHER_PORTALS/MP_CUSTOM_NETHER_PORTALS_Header.webp)

Tired of the same old nether portal?

This mod allows you to build portals to the Nether in any shape, size and orientation: on the floor, walls, ceiling or floating.This mod allows you to build portals to the Nether of any shape, size and orientation: on the floor, walls, ceiling or floating.

With Custom Nether Portals break the usual boundaries: create Nether portals of any size and shape. Total freedom to build epic entrances to the Nether.

This mod is fully compatible with Fabric, Forge and Neoforge, available for Minecraft 1.20.1 and 1.21.1.

Moreover, it works perfectly together with other dimension mods. It does not cause bugs, conflicts or interference, ensuring a smooth and seamless experience in your custom worlds or modpacks.

Want to play with friends?
